metadata.title: K-pop Ticket Hub
metadata.description: A global K-pop concert discovery and ticket-opening alert platform with official seller links only.

states.loadingDescription: We are lining up artist pages, seller links, and opening windows for you.
states.emptyTitle: No concerts matched this view yet
states.emptyDescription: Try another artist, city, or timing window. We only surface official links.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the page or try again in a moment.

footer.disclaimerBody: We do not sell tickets. Ticket times, prices, and venue policies can change at any time, so always double-check the official seller before checkout.
footer.freshness: Every concert detail page shows its last verification time.

hero.eyebrow: Never miss K-pop ticket openings again
hero.title: Track presales, convert time zones, and move to the official seller before the rush starts.
hero.subtitle: Artist-first discovery for fans who want a fast, structured path from discovery to checkout prep.

why.presaleBody: See membership requirements and ticket phases before the queue opens.
why.timezoneBody: View source time and your local time side by side.
why.officialBody: Move from our detail page straight to the trusted seller or promoter source.

artists.title: Find artists fast, then follow the ones you care about.
artists.subtitle: Browse by category, scan both Korean and English names, and keep your next ticket opening on one shortlist.
artists.searchPlaceholder: Search artists in Korean or English
artists.trackedConcerts: {count, plural, one {# concert currently tracked} other {# concerts currently tracked}}

concerts.title: Scan concerts by ticket urgency, not just by date.
concerts.subtitle: Structured cards keep seller, status, venue, and opening time visible at a glance.
concerts.ticketPhasesCount: {count, plural, one {# ticket phase} other {# ticket phases}}

detail.missingPrices: Price details are still pending from the official seller.
detail.missingPresale: No fanclub presale window has been published yet.
detail.externalUnavailable: Official seller link is temporarily unavailable.
detail.attendeeNameRequired: Attendee name should match the ID used at the venue.
detail.attendeeNameNotListed: No attendee-name match rule is currently listed.
detail.passportRequired: Passport or government ID may be required for ticket pickup.
detail.passportNotListed: Passport requirement is not currently listed.
detail.onsitePickupOnly: Ticket pickup is marked as on-site only.
detail.onsitePickupNotListed: No on-site-only pickup restriction is listed.
detail.antiMacroRule: Bulk or macro-style purchases may be cancelled.
detail.antiMacroNotListed: No anti-macro warning was detected yet.

alerts.title: My Alerts / My Artists
alerts.subtitle: Keep followed artists and reminder timing in one place while email is the MVP delivery channel.
alerts.panelBody: Choose the reminders you want before this sale starts.
alerts.success: Alert saved. We will watch this opening for you.
alerts.duplicate: This alert setup is already active.

auth.hint: Login, follow artists, and keep your reminders synced.
